hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'git commit'; then cd /Users/bytedance/code/eli && cargo fmt --all -- --check 2>&1 | tail -5 && cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings 2>&1 | tail -10; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '\.rs"'; then cd /Users/bytedance/code/eli && cargo check --workspace --message-format=short 2>&1 | tail -5; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '\.rs"'; then cd /Users/bytedance/code/eli && cargo check --workspace --message-format=short 2>&1 | tail -5; fi
